syllogism_text: There is no piece of furniture that can be called a planet. Each and every chair is a piece of furniture. Consequently, no chair is a planet.

attempts.code:
% No furniture is a planet
planet(_) :- fail.

% All chairs are furniture
furniture(X) :- chair(X).

% Witness chair
chair(library_chair).

% Validity check: No chair is a planet
valid_syllogism :- \+ (chair(X), planet(X)).
